summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the Advanced Admin Document Viewer feature (DocumentPreviewModal and DocActionButtons). All requested features work correctly - image zoom/pan, PDF embedding, disabled states, and quick action buttons.

issues: Minor: Dialog overlay (z-index 50) can intercept clicks when using Playwright automation with force=False, but works correctly in manual testing. The modal uses z-index 200 which properly appears above the dialog.

critical_code_review_comments: DocumentPreviewModal is well-implemented with proper z-index (200) to appear above the Dialog.
DocActionButtons correctly handles disabled state when hasFile is false.
Blob URL cleanup via URL.revokeObjectURL is properly implemented in closePreview handler.
fetchProtectedDocument in api.js correctly determines file type from content-type header.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@pawstraining.com / <see Railway env var DEMO_ADMIN_PASSWORD>
seed_data_creation: Used existing test bookings: TEST_ImageUpload User (JPEG docs), TEST_PDFUpload User (PDF docs), seed-8 Patricia Mora (final_payment_proof only)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document viewer feature fully tested. Key test IDs: deposit-proof-preview-btn, vaccine-cert-preview-btn, final-payment-preview-btn for DocActionButtons. Modal test IDs: doc-preview-overlay, image-preview-img, pdf-preview-frame, zoom-in-btn, zoom-out-btn, fit-screen-btn, open-new-tab-btn, download-doc-btn, close-preview-button

features_tested.admin_login: ✓ Works with admin@pawstraining.com / <see Railway env var DEMO_ADMIN_PASSWORD>
features_tested.booking_with_documents: ✓ TEST_ImageUpload User bookings have payment_proof (JPEG) and vaccination_certificate (PDF)
features_tested.doc_action_buttons: ✓ Renders for deposit proof, vaccination certificate, and final payment proof
features_tested.pdf_preview: ✓ Shows iframe (data-testid=pdf-preview-frame), zoom controls hidden for PDF
features_tested.disabled_state: ✓ Buttons disabled when booking has no document (tested with seed-8)
features_tested.quick_action_buttons: ✓ newtab-btn and download-btn present next to preview button
